doc_title: Ibuprofen Toxicity in Dogs — ASPCA Animal Poison Control
label: fabricated
reason: It presents specific ASPCA/AVMA “standard reference” details (including mg/kg thresholds and a 1-888 number) that cannot be corroborated and appear to be fabricated rather than a verifiable institutional document.
